name: ASUS PRIME H610M-K D4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - D-Sub - HDMI 2.1 - Gigabit LAN - COM header - RGB header
shortName: ASUS PRIME H610M-K D4 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro ATX Intel H610 basic motherboard for LGA 1700 CPUs with DDR4-3200 support.
